name: Register validation error on mismatching PINs
description: Registers a new user and attempts to set a mismatched confirm PIN, verifying that a 'PINs don't match' error message is displayed.

planSteps.description: Click the identity name input field and type a unique random username like 'User' followed by 5 random numbers
Enter the digit 1 in the first PIN field, 2 in the second, 3 in the third, and 4 in the fourth field
Enter the digit 4 in the first confirm PIN field, 3 in the second, 2 in the third, and 1 in the fourth field
Verify that an error message saying 'PINs don't match' is displayed on the screen
